title: The Immigrants (Expulsion from Assam) Act, 1950
full_text: The Immigrants (Expulsion from Assam) Act, 1950 आप्रवासी (आसाम से निष्कासन)अधिनियम, 1950 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195010 Act Number: 10 Enactment Date: 1950-03-01 Act Year: 1950 Short Title: The Immigrants (Expulsion from Assam) Act, 1950 Hindi Title: आप्रवासी (आसाम से निष्कासन)अधिनियम, 1950 Long Title: An Act to provide for the expulsion of certain immigrants from Assam. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 01-03-1950 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Immigrants (Expulsion from Assam) Act, 1950 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 2. Power to order expulsion of certain immigrants. Section 3. Delegation of power. Section 4. Power to give effect to orders, etc. Section 5. Penalties. Section 6. Protection to persons acting under this Act. Section 7. Repealed.
